Source: bemap-services-v2/search/bemap-geocoding-response-parser.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - GeocodingResponse parser (v1.5)
 *
 * Maps the v1.5 endpoint payloads into a `bemap.GeocodingResponse` carrying
 * `bemap.GeocodingItem` entries — preserving the capitalised property names
 * (`Coordinate`, `PostalAddress`, `RoadFeature`) used by BeMap-Doc and other
 * legacy consumers.
 *
 * Two distinct wrappers are accepted:
 *   - `service/geocoding/1.0/reverse`            →  `{ extent, elements: [...], maximunResult }`
 *   - `service/geocoding/autocomplete/1.0`       →  `{ items: [...] }`
 *
 * Per-item field naming differences (verified against live beta responses):
 *   - reverse:       `postalAddress`, `coordinate`, `distanceFromRequest`,
 *                    `postalAddressClassType`, `postalAddressClassId`,
 *                    `postalAddressExactStreeNumber` (sic),
 *                    `angle`, `administrativeSpeedLimit`, `relevanceScore`,
 *                    `countryRelevanceScore`, `cityRelevanceScore`,
 *                    `postalCodeRelevanceScore`, `streetRelevanceScore`,
 *                    `streetNumberRelevanceScore`, `roadInfo`,
 *                    `geoElementTypes`, `segmentId`
 *   - autocomplete:  `coordinate`, `place`, `reference`, `postalAddress`
 *
 * @since 1.5.0
 * @public
 * @param {Object} json
 * @return {bemap.GeocodingResponse}
 */
bemap.parseGeocodingResponseV2 = function(json) {
    var response = new bemap.GeocodingResponse();
    if (!json) return response;

    // Reverse-geocoding wraps results in `elements`; autocomplete uses `items`.
    // Tolerate `results` and a bare root array as fallbacks.
    var rawItems = null;
    if (Array.isArray(json.elements)) rawItems = json.elements;
    else if (Array.isArray(json.items)) rawItems = json.items;
    else if (Array.isArray(json.results)) rawItems = json.results;
    else if (Array.isArray(json)) rawItems = json;
    if (!rawItems) rawItems = [];

    for (var i = 0; i < rawItems.length; i++) {
        var raw = rawItems[i];
        var item = new bemap.GeocodingItem();
        item.index = i + 1;

        if (raw.coordinate) {
            var lon = (raw.coordinate.lon !== undefined)
                ? raw.coordinate.lon
                : (raw.coordinate.longitude !== undefined)
                    ? raw.coordinate.longitude
                    : raw.coordinate.x;
            var lat = (raw.coordinate.lat !== undefined)
                ? raw.coordinate.lat
                : (raw.coordinate.latitude !== undefined)
                    ? raw.coordinate.latitude
                    : raw.coordinate.y;
            item.Coordinate = new bemap.Coordinate(lon, lat);
        }

        if (raw.postalAddress) {
            var p = raw.postalAddress;
            item.PostalAddress = [new bemap.PostalAddress({
                countryCode: p.countryCode,
                country: p.country,
                state: p.state,
                county: p.county,
                city: p.city,
                district: p.district,
                postalCode: p.postalCode,
                roadNumber: p.roadNumber,
                street: p.street,
                streetNumber: p.streetNumber
            })];
        }

        if (typeof raw.angle === 'number') item.Angle = raw.angle;

        // Reverse geocoding emits `administrativeSpeedLimit`; older /
        // autocomplete payloads use `speedLimit`. Both map to GeocodingItem.SpeedLimit.
        if (typeof raw.administrativeSpeedLimit === 'number') {
            item.SpeedLimit = raw.administrativeSpeedLimit;
        } else if (typeof raw.speedLimit === 'number') {
            item.SpeedLimit = raw.speedLimit;
        }

        if (typeof raw.relevanceScore === 'number') item.RelevanceScore = raw.relevanceScore;

        // Server emits `roadInfo` on reverse geocoding; older fixtures used `roadFeature`.
        var rawRoad = raw.roadInfo || raw.roadFeature;
        if (rawRoad) {
            var rf = new bemap.RoadFeature();
            for (var k in rawRoad) {
                if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(rawRoad, k)) rf[k] = rawRoad[k];
            }
            item.RoadFeature = [rf];
        }

        // Autocomplete-only metadata
        if (raw.place) item.place = raw.place;
        if (raw.reference) item.reference = raw.reference;

        // Reverse-geocoding extras — exposed verbatim so consumer code can
        // reach them without a new typed wrapper for every server field.
        if (typeof raw.distanceFromRequest === 'number') item.distanceFromRequest = raw.distanceFromRequest;
        if (raw.postalAddressClassType) item.postalAddressClassType = raw.postalAddressClassType;
        if (typeof raw.postalAddressClassId === 'number') item.postalAddressClassId = raw.postalAddressClassId;
        if (typeof raw.postalAddressExactStreeNumber === 'boolean') {
            item.postalAddressExactStreeNumber = raw.postalAddressExactStreeNumber;
        }
        if (typeof raw.countryRelevanceScore === 'number') item.countryRelevanceScore = raw.countryRelevanceScore;
        if (typeof raw.cityRelevanceScore === 'number') item.cityRelevanceScore = raw.cityRelevanceScore;
        if (typeof raw.postalCodeRelevanceScore === 'number') item.postalCodeRelevanceScore = raw.postalCodeRelevanceScore;
        if (typeof raw.streetRelevanceScore === 'number') item.streetRelevanceScore = raw.streetRelevanceScore;
        if (typeof raw.streetNumberRelevanceScore === 'number') item.streetNumberRelevanceScore = raw.streetNumberRelevanceScore;
        if (Array.isArray(raw.geoElementTypes)) item.geoElementTypes = raw.geoElementTypes.slice();
        if (typeof raw.segmentId === 'number') item.segmentId = raw.segmentId;

        response.geocodingItems.push(item);
    }

    if (json.extent) {
        response.extent = new bemap.BoundingBox(
            json.extent.minLon !== undefined ? json.extent.minLon : json.extent.minX,
            json.extent.minLat !== undefined ? json.extent.minLat : json.extent.minY,
            json.extent.maxLon !== undefined ? json.extent.maxLon : json.extent.maxX,
            json.extent.maxLat !== undefined ? json.extent.maxLat : json.extent.maxY
        );
    }

    if (json.action) response.action = json.action;

    return response;
};
